zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Singleton於大約1204年出生在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆時，他的父親Alan de Singleton11202歲，母親Alice Winwick14歲。他和Catherine de Meols至少有4個兒子。他去世於1262年之後在英國藍卡爾鮑頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Singleton于大约1204年出生在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆时，他的父亲Alan de Singleton11202岁，母亲Alice Winwick14岁。他和Catherine de Meols至少有4个儿子。他去世于1262年之后在英国藍卡爾鮑頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Singleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Singleton (Lancashire), probably from Old English scingol ‘shingle, wooden roof tile’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Bearers of this surname are said to be descended from Ughtred de Sinleton, holder of lands in Amounderness wapentake (Lancashire) c. 1160–90. This name was first recorded in Ireland in 1308 and firmly established in Louth and Monaghan during the 17th century.
habitational name from Singleton (Sussex), probably from Old English sængel, sengel ‘bundle, tuft’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Shingleton
meanings: English: late medieval variant of   Singleton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Singleton was born about 1204, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England, his father, Alan de Singleton, was 11202 and his mother, Alice Winwick, was 14. He had at least 4 sons with Catherine de Meols. He died after 1262, in Broughton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Singleton est né environ 1204, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Alan de Singleton, avait 11202 ans et sa mère, Alice Winwick, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Catherine de Meols. Il est décédé après 1262, à Broughton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Singleton um 1204 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan de Singleton 11202 und seine Mutter Alice Winwick 14. Er hatte mit Catherine de Meols mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb nach 1262 in Broughton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Singleton è nato il circa 1204 nel Kirkham, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Alan de Singleton, aveva 11202 anni e il suo madre, Alice Winwick, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Catherine de Meols. Morì dopo il 1262, nel Broughton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Singletonが約1204年にイギリスランカシュアイアキルクハムで生まれた時，父Alan de Singletonは11202歳，母Alice Winwickは14歳であった。彼はCatherine de Meolsとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1262年以後にイギリスランカシュアイアブロウトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Singleton(이)가 대략 1204년 영국 랭카실르 커크함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan de Singleton(은)는 11202세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Winwick(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Catherine de Meols(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1262년 이후 영국 랭카실르 브루그h턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Singleton nasceu aproximadamente 1204, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan de Singleton, tinha 11202 anos e sua mãe, Alice Winwick, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Catherine de Meols. Ele faleceu após 1262, em Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Singleton родился около 1204 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan de Singleton было 11202 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Winwick, 14. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Catherine de Meols. Он умер после 1262 г. в местности броугтон, ланкашир, Англия.

sm.about 1204–Aft 1262: e tusa o le 1204–ina ua ma'ea le 1262

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Singleton nació aproximadamente 1204, en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan de Singleton, tenía 11202 años y su mamá, Alice Winwick, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Catherine de Meols. Murió después de 1262, en Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
